message:
feat: extend VCR with adapter-level recording and streaming support

Add createAdapterVcr() for testing provider adapters directly.
Add stream() support to client VCR (createVcr).
New cassette entry types (VcrCompleteEntry, VcrStreamEntry) with
backward-compatible handling of legacy fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
